notes: Bookmarks browser, translation, history-aware search, and a vault security dashboard.
items: Real bookmarks browser — folders and all, nothing wiped
Translate any selected text, plus a full translator (Alt+G)
Search bar now suggests from your history and bookmarks
Vault security dashboard — score, weak/reused breakdown, 2FA coverage
Display settings: size, weight, board width, open-in-new-tab
items.notes: Bookmarks, translation, smarter search, and a vault security dashboard.
items: Real bookmarks — the saved tab now browses your actual browser bookmarks, folders and all
Translation — select text to translate inline, or open the full translator with Alt+G
Smarter search — the bar now suggests from your history and bookmarks, like the address bar
Vault security dashboard — a score ring, weak/reused breakdown, 2FA coverage, and recently used/saved
Display settings — size (S/M/L), bold text, board width, and open-links-in-new-tab
